lint.note: services.yaml defines lint as a no-op placeholder.

blockingIssues.description: This feature commit modifies unrelated onchain live-catalog assertions (`poolDataSpy`/`dexVolumesSpy`) even though the feature was supposed to add a focused `/diagnostics/ohlcv_sync` proof and only include strictly necessary app-test repair hunks. The commit therefore does not stay isolated to the claimed diagnostics proof.

The commit adds multiple SQD-backed trades pagination/validation tests in the large shared app suite, which are unrelated to `/diagnostics/ohlcv_sync` and directly violate the feature instruction to implement the proof in a new focused diagnostics test surface rather than iterating further inside `tests/app.test.ts`.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Relax or qualify mandatory manual HTTP curl verification in core-api-worker for internal-only service/helper features that do not change an HTTP contract.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Multiple historical-durability reviews flagged that helper/runtime-only OHLCV features were forced through low-value API curl checks despite touching only service logic and tests. Evidence: `.factory/skills/core-api-worker/SKILL.md` step 7 mandates starting the API and curling endpoints, while `ohlcv-gap-detection-repair` and `fix-ohlcv-gap-repair-partial-window-closure` only modify `src/services/candle-store.ts` plus OHLCV tests and handoffs explicitly call out this mismatch.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Route runtime/backfill lifecycle features to runtime-provider-worker instead of core-api-worker when the work is primarily provider/runtime coordination.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: wire-ohlcv-gap-repair-into-runtime-sync review found the runtime wiring feature was assigned to core-api-worker even though the runtime-provider-worker skill already covers this domain. Evidence: features.json:1567 assigns `skillName: "core-api-worker"` for this runtime wiring feature, while `.factory/skills/runtime-provider-worker/SKILL.md` says it should be used for provider/runtime coordination, startup lifecycle, and runtime-state changes.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Relax or qualify mandatory manual HTTP curl verification in core-api-worker for internal-only service/helper features that do not change an HTTP contract.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Multiple historical-durability reviews flagged that helper/runtime-only OHLCV features were forced through low-value API curl checks despite touching only service logic and tests. Evidence: `.factory/skills/core-api-worker/SKILL.md` step 7 requires starting the API and curling endpoints; the fix handoff for session `03f85aef-08bc-4533-a6db-a026ccdce1da` records `/ping` and `/coins/bitcoin/ohlc?...` checks even though the actual behavior under review lives in `src/services/candle-store.ts` and `tests/ohlcv-gap-repair.test.ts`. Prior synthesis already noted the same mismatch for this helper-level scrutiny thread.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add a concrete non-interactive staging-isolation procedure for shared-file commits when `git add --patch` is unavailable in exec mode.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The diagnostics-proof review showed a worker abandoned partial staging and committed unrelated shared-file hunks because the skill lacked an exec-safe alternative. Evidence: worker-transcripts.jsonl entry for session `74a5abdf-5b5b-41cc-8098-240c40485ad7` shows `git add --patch tests/app.test.ts`, then `git add tests/app.test.ts tests/ohlcv-diagnostics.test.ts && git commit ...`; commit `1c89fcf` includes unrelated `tests/app.test.ts` onchain hunks.

rejectedObservations.observation: The worker treated port 3102 as occupied by a pre-existing `api-validation` service and relied on that server for manual curl verification, but `.factory/services.yaml` only documents a single `api` service entry. The shared service manifest does not capture the validation-server lifecycle the mission instructions and handoff refer to.
rejectedObservations.reason: Rejected because `.factory/services.yaml` already documents both `api` and `api-validation`; the review evidence was stale rather than indicating a current shared-state gap.

override.justification: Round 4 validators are green and the remaining scrutiny failure is limited to commit-scope isolation in `1c89fcf`, not a current-head runtime or contract defect. `tests/ohlcv-diagnostics.test.ts` provides the required route-level proof for VAL-HIST-009, and core-api-worker guidance has been updated to avoid future shared-file staging drift in exec mode.
